# LLM prompts

Versioned prompt files for the four LLM stages defined in the consensus plan. Each prompt declares its stage, its allowed tools, and its output contract. Source: [`prompts/`](../../prompts/).

| File | Stage | First-line title |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [`design.v1.md`](../../prompts/design.v1.md) | `design` | Design prompt — v1 |

| [`firewall_compose.v1.md`](../../prompts/firewall_compose.v1.md) | `firewall_compose` | Firewall change composer prompt — v1.x (deferred from MVP) |
